findings.title: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements
findings.wcag_name: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements
findings.actual_results:
Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements

URL: https://sisenable.com/

Focusable content should have tabindex="-1" or be removed from the DOM
- "Get your free audit" in "Get your free audit"
findings.recommendation: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

all.message: Focusable content should have tabindex="-1" or be removed from the DOM

raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Focusable content should have tabindex="-1" or be removed from the DOM

findings.title: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children
findings.wcag_name: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children
findings.actual_results:
Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them

URL: https://sisenable.com/

Element has children which are not allowed: h3[tabindex]
- "Seasoned Experience With deep roots in healthcare, banking, and IT, our legacy s" in "Why Businesses Trust enable"
findings.recommendation: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

relatedNodes.html: Innovation at Work
Championing Inclusivity
Your WCAG Ally

any.message: Element has children which are not allowed: h3[tabindex]

raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has children which are not allowed: h3[tabindex]

findings.title: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly
findings.wcag_name: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field

URL: https://sisenable.com/

the autocomplete attribute is incorrectly formatted
- "phonenumber" in "section#contactForm"
findings.incorrect_code: <input class="did-floating-input f..." type="text" id="phonenumber" name="phonenumber" placeholder="" aria-describedby="phoneHelp" oninvalid="this.setCustomValidi..." oninput="this.setCustomValidi..." required="" autocomplete="phonenumber" aria-required="true">
findings.recommendation: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly

all.message: the autocomplete attribute is incorrectly formatted

raw_nodes.html: <input class="did-floating-input f..." type="text" id="phonenumber" name="phonenumber" placeholder="" aria-describedby="phoneHelp" oninvalid="this.setCustomValidi..." oninput="this.setCustomValidi..." required="" autocomplete="phonenumber" aria-required="true">
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  the autocomplete attribute is incorrectly formatted
